from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from collections.abc import AsyncIterator

from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware

from ml_toolbox.config import DATA_DIR
from ml_toolbox.routers import nodes, pipelines, ws


@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI) -> AsyncIterator[None]:
    DATA_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    yield


app = FastAPI(title="ML Toolbox", lifespan=lifespan)

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

app.include_router(nodes.router)
app.include_router(pipelines.router)
app.include_router(ws.router)

name: CD

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  packages: write

jobs:
  detect-changes:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      backend: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.backend }}
      sandbox: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.sandbox }}
      frontend: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.frontend }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            backend:
              - 'backend/src/**'
              - 'backend/pyproject.toml'
              - 'backend/uv.lock'
              - 'backend/Dockerfile'
            sandbox:
              - 'backend/sandbox/**'
            frontend:
              - 'frontend/src/**'
              - 'frontend/package.json'
              - 'frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml'

  build-backend:
    needs: detect-changes
    if: needs.detect-changes.outputs.backend == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
      - uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: ./backend
          push: true
          platforms: linux/arm64
          tags: ghcr.io/minyic7/ml-toolbox/backend:latest
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

  build-sandbox:
    needs: detect-changes
    if: needs.detect-changes.outputs.sandbox == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
      - uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: ./backend/sandbox
          push: true
          tags: ghcr.io/minyic7/ml-toolbox/sandbox:latest
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

  build-frontend:
    needs: detect-changes
    if: needs.detect-changes.outputs.frontend == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: frontend
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 9
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: pnpm
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm build
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: frontend-dist
          path: frontend/dist
          retention-days: 1

  deploy:
    needs: [build-backend, build-sandbox, build-frontend]
    if: always() && !contains(needs.*.result, 'failure') && (needs.build-backend.result == 'success' || needs.build-sandbox.result == 'success' || needs.build-frontend.result == 'success')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: tailscale/github-action@v3
        with:
          oauth-client-id: ${{ secrets.TS_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID }}
          oauth-secret: ${{ secrets.TS_OAUTH_SECRET }}
          tags: tag:ci

      - name: Setup SSH
        run: |
          mkdir -p ~/.ssh
          echo "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_KEY }}" > ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
          ssh-keyscan -H ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }} >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

      - name: SCP config files
        run: |
          scp docker-compose.yml Caddyfile \
            ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}@${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}:~/ml-toolbox/

      - name: Download frontend artifact
        if: needs.build-frontend.result == 'success'
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: frontend-dist
          path: frontend/dist

      - name: Rsync frontend
        if: needs.build-frontend.result == 'success'
        run: |
          rsync -az --delete frontend/dist/ \
            ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}@${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}:~/ml-toolbox/frontend/dist/

      - name: Pull and restart containers
        if: needs.build-backend.result == 'success' || needs.build-sandbox.result == 'success'
        run: |
          ssh ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}@${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }} \
            "cd ~/ml-toolbox && docker compose pull && docker compose up -d"

# .github/workflows/ci.yml

name: CI

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  ci-backend:
    name: Backend
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: backend
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
        with:
          python-version: "3.13"
          enable-cache: true

      - name: Install deps
        run: uv sync --frozen

      - name: Ruff format check
        run: uv run ruff format --check src/

      - name: Pyright
        run: uv run pyright src/

      - name: Pytest
        run: uv run pytest tests/ -x -q

  ci-frontend:
    name: Frontend
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: frontend
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 9

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: pnpm
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml

      - name: Install deps
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: ESLint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: TypeScript check
        run: pnpm tsc --noEmit

# .github/workflows/cd.yml

name: CD

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  detect-changes:
    name: Detect changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      backend:  ${{ steps.filter.outputs.backend }}
      sandbox:  ${{ steps.filter.outputs.sandbox }}
      frontend: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.frontend }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            backend:
              - 'backend/src/**'
              - 'backend/pyproject.toml'
              - 'backend/uv.lock'
              - 'Dockerfile'
            sandbox:
              - 'backend/sandbox/**'
            frontend:
              - 'frontend/src/**'
              - 'frontend/package.json'
              - 'frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml'

  build-backend:
    name: Build backend
    needs: detect-changes
    if: needs.detect-changes.outputs.backend == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
      - uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: .
          file: Dockerfile
          push: true
          platforms: linux/arm64
          tags: ghcr.io/minyic7/ml-toolbox/backend:latest
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

  build-sandbox:
    name: Build sandbox
    needs: detect-changes
    if: needs.detect-changes.outputs.sandbox == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
      - uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: ./backend/sandbox
          push: true
          platforms: linux/arm64
          tags: ghcr.io/minyic7/ml-toolbox/sandbox:latest
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

  build-frontend:
    name: Build frontend
    needs: detect-changes
    if: needs.detect-changes.outputs.frontend == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 9
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: pnpm
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
        working-directory: frontend
      - run: pnpm build
        working-directory: frontend
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: frontend-dist
          path: frontend/dist/
          retention-days: 1

  deploy:
    name: Deploy
    needs: [build-backend, build-sandbox, build-frontend]
    if: |
      always() &&
      !contains(needs.*.result, 'failure') &&
      !contains(needs.*.result, 'cancelled') &&
      (
        needs.build-backend.result  == 'success' ||
        needs.build-sandbox.result  == 'success' ||
        needs.build-frontend.result == 'success'
      )
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Connect Tailscale
        uses: tailscale/github-action@v2
        with:
          oauth-client-id: ${{ secrets.TS_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID }}
          oauth-secret:    ${{ secrets.TS_OAUTH_SECRET }}
          tags: tag:ci

      - name: Setup SSH
        run: |
          echo "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_KEY }}" > /tmp/deploy_key
          chmod 600 /tmp/deploy_key

      - name: Upload compose files
        run: |
          scp -i /tmp/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
            docker-compose.yml Caddyfile \
            ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}@${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}:~/ml-toolbox/

      - name: Download frontend artifact
        if: needs.build-frontend.result == 'success'
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: frontend-dist
          path: frontend/dist/

      - name: Sync frontend
        if: needs.build-frontend.result == 'success'
        run: |
          rsync -az --delete -e "ssh -i /tmp/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no" \
            frontend/dist/ \
            ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}@${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}:~/ml-toolbox/frontend/dist/

      - name: Deploy containers
        if: |
          needs.build-backend.result == 'success' ||
          needs.build-sandbox.result == 'success'
        run: |
          ssh -i /tmp/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
            ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}@${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }} << 'EOF'
            cd ~/ml-toolbox
            echo ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }} | docker login ghcr.io -u ${{ github.actor }} --password-stdin
            docker compose pull
            docker compose up -d --no-build
            docker image prune -f
          EOF

# .github/workflows/ci.yml

name: CI

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  ci-backend:
    name: Backend
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: backend
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
        with:
          python-version: "3.13"
          enable-cache: true

      - name: Install deps
        run: uv sync --frozen

      - name: Ruff format check
        run: uv run ruff format --check src/

      - name: Pyright
        run: uv run pyright src/

      - name: Pytest
        run: uv run pytest tests/ -x -q

  ci-frontend:
    name: Frontend
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: frontend
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 9

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: pnpm
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml

      - name: Install deps
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: ESLint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: TypeScript check
        run: pnpm tsc --noEmit

          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
      - uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: ./backend/sandbox
          push: true
          platforms: linux/arm64
          tags: ghcr.io/minyic7/ml-toolbox/sandbox:latest
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

  build-frontend:
    name: Build frontend
    needs: detect-changes
    if: needs.detect-changes.outputs.frontend == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 9
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: pnpm
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
        working-directory: frontend
      - run: pnpm build
        working-directory: frontend
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: frontend-dist
          path: frontend/dist/
          retention-days: 1

  deploy:
    name: Deploy
    needs: [build-backend, build-sandbox, build-frontend]
    if: |
      always() &&
      !contains(needs.*.result, 'failure') &&
      !contains(needs.*.result, 'cancelled') &&
      (
        needs.build-backend.result  == 'success' ||
        needs.build-sandbox.result  == 'success' ||
        needs.build-frontend.result == 'success'
      )
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Connect Tailscale
        uses: tailscale/github-action@v2
        with:
          oauth-client-id: ${{ secrets.TS_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID }}
          oauth-secret:    ${{ secrets.TS_OAUTH_SECRET }}
          tags: tag:ci

      - name: Setup SSH
        run: |
          echo "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_KEY }}" > /tmp/deploy_key
          chmod 600 /tmp/deploy_key

      - name: Upload compose files
        run: |
          scp -i /tmp/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
            docker-compose.yml Caddyfile \
            ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}@${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}:~/ml-toolbox/

      - name: Download frontend artifact
        if: needs.build-frontend.result == 'success'
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: frontend-dist
          path: frontend/dist/

      - name: Sync frontend
        if: needs.build-frontend.result == 'success'
        run: |
          rsync -az --delete -e "ssh -i /tmp/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no" \
            frontend/dist/ \
            ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}@${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}:~/ml-toolbox/frontend/dist/

      - name: Deploy containers
        if: |
          needs.build-backend.result == 'success' ||
          needs.build-sandbox.result == 'success'
        run: |
          ssh -i /tmp/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
            ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}@${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }} << 'EOF'
            cd ~/ml-toolbox
            echo ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }} | docker login ghcr.io -u ${{ github.actor }} --password-stdin
            docker compose pull
            docker compose up -d --no-build
            docker image prune -f
          EOF
